evals.prompt: Generate a slide deck on context management using the canon-slides skill. Use the canon theme.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads the source files (standards/efficiency.md, skills/context-check/SKILL.md, skills/sprint/SKILL.md), writes slides/context-management.md with valid Marp frontmatter (marp: true, theme: canon), includes slide separators (---), and provides render instructions that create both HTML and PPTX using themes/canon.css.
expectations: Reads at least two of the three source files: standards/efficiency.md, skills/context-check/SKILL.md, skills/sprint/SKILL.md
Writes slides/context-management.md
Output file contains 'marp: true' in frontmatter
Output file contains 'theme: canon' in frontmatter
Output file contains at least 5 slide separators (---) beyond the frontmatter delimiters
Provides render instructions with --theme skills/canon-slides/themes/canon.css or npm run slides
Reports both posts/slides/context-management.html and posts/slides/context-management.pptx outputs

evals.prompt: Create a presentation on the evaluator pattern using canon-slides with the octave theme.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads evaluator-related source files (skills/sprint/reference/eval.md, skills/skill-eval/SKILL.md, DECISIONS.md), writes slides/evaluator-pattern.md with octave theme frontmatter, and provides render instructions that create HTML and PPTX with themes/octave.css.
expectations: Reads skills/sprint/reference/eval.md or skills/skill-eval/SKILL.md
Writes slides/evaluator-pattern.md
Output file contains 'theme: octave' in frontmatter
Deck covers generator-evaluator separation or clean context concept
Provides render instructions with --theme skills/canon-slides/themes/octave.css or npm run slides
Reports both HTML and PPTX output paths

evals.prompt: Use canon-slides to create a deck on 'deployment pipelines'.
evals.expected_output: The skill rejects the unknown topic slug and lists the three valid topics (context-management, evaluator-pattern, skill-authoring). It does not attempt to generate slides.
expectations: Does not write any slides/*.md file
Lists the valid topic slugs: context-management, evaluator-pattern, skill-authoring
Explains that 'deployment pipelines' is not a supported topic

evals.prompt: Build the skill-authoring slide deck with the canon theme.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads standards/skill-setup-std.md and guides/skill-authoring.md, structures the deck with the required outline sections (title, problem, core pattern, canon implementation, gotchas, summary), and render instructions include --allow-local-files or the repo render script.
expectations: Reads standards/skill-setup-std.md or guides/skill-authoring.md
Writes slides/skill-authoring.md
Deck includes a title slide and a summary/takeaways slide
Render instructions include --allow-local-files or npm run slides
Render instructions reference skills/canon-slides/themes/canon.css or npm run slides

evals.prompt: Generate the context-management deck but npx is not available on this machine.
evals.expected_output: The skill generates slides/context-management.md successfully, attempts to render, detects the failure, and gives the user a manual install instruction for marp-cli without crashing or leaving the task incomplete.
expectations: Still writes slides/context-management.md with valid Marp content
Informs the user that marp-cli is not available
Provides the install command: npm install -g @marp-team/marp-cli
Provides npm run slides or a manual render command the user can run themselves
